items.headline: Artem Zub out for Ottawa Senators in Game 2
items.description:
RALEIGH, N.C. -- Artem Zub did not play for the Ottawa Senators in Game 2 of the Eastern Conference First Round against the Carolina Hurricanes at Lenovo Center on Monday.
The defenseman sustained an undisclosed injury early in the second period of a 2-0 loss in Game 1 on Saturday

items.headline: Zdeno Chara Bruins 2026 Boston Marathon
items.description:
If Zdeno Chara keeps this up, his running career is going to mirror the length of his NHL career.
The veteran of 24 NHL seasons - 14 of them with the Boston Bruins, including serving as captain for the 2011 Stanley Cup champions - ran the 130th Boston Marathon on

items.headline: Pittsburgh Pirates wear Penguins jerseys on road trip
items.description:
Looks like the Pittsburgh Pirates have mastered the arrrr-t of the hockey jersey.
The MLB team showed support for their cross-town friends on Monday ahead of Game 2 of the Eastern Conference First Round, rocking Pittsburgh Penguins jerseys as they hit the road for their next contest.

items.headline: Jets GM Kevin Cheveldayoff says Connor Hellebuyck comments driven by emotion
items.description: WINNIPEG -- Kevin Cheveldayoff understands Connor Hellebuyck’s frustration. The Winnipeg Jets general manager believes it’s part of what makes his No. 1 goalie a star.

items.headline: Logan OConnor return big boost for Colorado Avalanche entering game 2
items.description: DENVER -- Logan O'Connor hurried back into the offensive zone, the Colorado Avalanche forward the first to notice the puck tossed back there by linemate Jack Drury. One wrist shot later and the Avalanche had a lead that would hold up in Game 1 of the Western Conference First Round.

items.headline: Vegas Golden Knights 4th line contributing early in Western Conference 1st Round
items.description: LAS VEGAS -- The Vegas Golden Knights’ revamped fourth line has found chemistry at the right time, a trend they hope continues in Game 2 of the Western Conference First Round against the Utah Mammoth at T-Mobile Arena on Tuesday (9:30 p.m. ET; Utah16, SCRIPPS, ESPN2, TVAS2, SN, CBC).

items.headline: Los Angeles Kings know they need to generate more in Game 2
items.description:
DENVER -- The Los Angeles Kings strive to be more aggressive from the start of Game 2 in the Western Conference First Round against the Colorado Avalanche at Ball Arena on Tuesday (10 p.m. ET; FDSNSC, ESPN, ALT, SN360, TVAS).
“We need more zone time,” interim coach D.J. Smith said

items.headline: Boston to 'regroup, recharge' from loss before Game 2 vs.  Buffalo
items.description:
BUFFALO -- For 50 minutes, the Boston Bruins did what they had intended to do.

items.headline: Washington will be patient while Alex Ovechkin considers retirement
items.description:
ARLINGTON, Va. -- The Washington Capitals have entered their offseason with two plans.
One includes Alex Ovechkin returning for his 22nd NHL season. The other is the beginning of life without the NHL's all-time leader in goals.
At some point, Ovechkin will sit down with management and owner Ted Leonsis

items.headline: Tampa Bay Lightning aim to improve penalty kill in Game of Eastern First Round
items.description:
TAMPA -- Brandon Hagel had some great news for the Tampa Bay Lightning and their fans on Monday.
“The sun came up this morning,” the forward said following practice at Benchmark International Arena.
Tampa Bay trails in the Eastern Conference First Round against the Montreal Canadiens heading into Game 2

items.headline: Mammoth Sean Durzi fined maximum for head-butting in Game 1 against Golden Knights
items.description: NEW YORK -- Utah Mammoth defenseman Sean Durzi has been fined $5,000, the maximum allowable under the Collective Bargaining Agreement, for head-butting Vegas Golden Knights defenseman Rasmus Andersson during Game 1 of the teams’ First Round series in Las Vegas on Sunday, April 19, the National Hockey League’s Department of
